title: Use non-numbered feedback.json for backward diagnostic feedback
context: Planning skills like q-brief and q-blueprint need diagnostic/consistency feedback from read-only analytical skills like q-analyze without modifying the immutable 00..07 lifecycle sequence.
content: Diagnostic feedback findings are captured in a schema-validated, non-numbered feedback.json artifact in the task directory. Planning skills selectively consume and clean up this file (mechanical fixes auto-applied, semantic ones presented to human) to close the planning loop.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new numbered lifecycle artifacts like 08-feedback.json because they violate the canonical SDC 00..07 structure.
Do not allow q-analyze to write directly to 00-spec.yaml or 01-blueprint.yaml, keeping diagnostic skills strictly read-only on core lifecycle files.
